audit_policy.post_draw_timing_check: certain failure when generated Pacific calendar date is later than the explicit or filename-claimed draw date; same-day status is not inferred without an authoritative draw/post timestamp
audit_policy.winning_result_policy: verified only when official California Lottery and at least one approved backup agree exactly

findings.message: History artifact contains a schema header but no verified draws.
History schema cannot record both source fetches and status.
Legacy timestamp_utc is usable but is not the canonical generated_timestamp_utc field.
Prediction cannot be treated as a production locked bundle.
Prediction lacks data required to reproduce its model fit, simulation, and optimizer decision.

A three-number main combination occurs more than once.
